expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: final quality pass preserves layering and executable wording
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly maps Phase 6 to the case focus: it states Phase 6 is the “final layering/search/few-shots quality pass,” cites explicit layering requirements (“Final layering must be: 1. central topic ... 6. observable verification leaves” and validators like “validate_final_layering”), and explicitly ties executable wording to Phase 6 via “validate_executable_steps.” It also includes an explicit expectation check section: “Case focus explicitly covered — Pass (by contract evidence).”

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase6
expectations.evidence: result.md is centered on Phase 6 throughout: “Primary phase/checkpoint under test: Phase 6,” then enumerates Phase 6 entry/work/outputs (“scripts/phase6.sh,” “phase6_spawn_manifest.json,” “drafts/qa_plan_phase6_r<round>.md,” “context/quality_delta_<feature-id>.md”) and Phase 6 gates/validators. It also contains an explicit check: “Output aligns with primary phase phase6 — Pass (by contract evidence).”
